item.title: Just Because Women Can't Handle These, Doesn't Mean Men Can't
item.description: Just because some women reject these traits doesn’t mean men don’t value them deeply.

media:content.media:title: Just Because Women Can't Handle These, Doesn't Mean Men Can't
media:content.media:description: Just because some women reject these traits doesn’t mean men don’t value them deeply.

item.title: Respect to hardworking men
item.description: A salute to the hardworking men who keep showing up and getting it done every day.

media:content.media:title: Respect to hardworking men
media:content.media:description: A salute to the hardworking men who keep showing up and getting it done every day.

item.title: Men with hobbies doesn’t mean they’re golfing all day Saturday…there’s many hobbies guys enjoy.
item.description: Men’s hobbies go way beyond golf, and most of them are more relatable than you think.

media:content.media:title: Men with hobbies doesn’t mean they’re golfing all day Saturday…there’s many hobbies guys enjoy.
media:content.media:description: Men’s hobbies go way beyond golf, and most of them are more relatable than you think.

item.title: When You Find A Good Man, Make Sure To Thank His Ex
item.description: Sometimes the best man in your life was shaped by the woman before you.

item.title: He Shouldn't Have To Read your Mind!

item.title: Her man is a king that needs to find his queen…
